title: CreateBound
description: A highly optimized Fabric modpack combining Create with immersive food, furniture, custom biomes, dungeons, atmospheric mobs, and voice chat — all while keeping a vanilla-friendly style and high FPS.
body:
#  🍃CreateBound
**Overview**

A performance-optimized, vanilla-friendly Fabric 1.20.1 modpack built around the latest Create mod with addons, new worldgen, mobs, farming, decorations, and structures.

A pack for those who want immersive survival, factory builds, custom dungeons, and chill vibes without breaking vanilla style.

## Main Features
🛠️ Create mod + addons

🌎 Custom biomes & worldgen (Terralith, Cinderscapes, YUNG’s)

🏰 New structures, dungeons & temples

🍳 Expanded farming, food & drinks (Farmer’s Delight, Cultural Delights, Let’s Do series)

🛋️ Furniture & decorations (Decorative Blocks, MCW Furniture)

🎙️ Proximity voice chat (PlasmoVoice)

😄 Emotes & animations (Emotecraft, Online Emotes, NotEnoughAnimations)

⚔️ New armor & melee weapons (no guns)

🎶 Ambient sounds & footsteps

⚡ FPS-boosted with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, LazyDFU, Krypton

🖥️ Better UI & QoL improvements (BetterF3, Jade, Mod Menu, etc.)

### This is just Beta , and more tweaks, mods, and balance updates will come as feedback rolls in.

If you run into issues, have mod suggestions, or want to show off your builds — drop a message!

Thanks for checking out CreateBound ✌️
Now get out there, build something insane, and enjoy the world!
